title: ISONE LMP Real Time 5 Min CSV download
description:
[DEPRECATED IN FAVOR OF THE [PRELIMINARY DATASET](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/isone_lmp_real_time_5_min_prelim)] 

Preliminary, real-time, 5-minute, LMPs as reported by ISONE. Includes all locations.

This dataset includes the location types:

- *DRRAZ*
- *NETWORK NODE*
- *EXT. NODE*
- *HUB*
- *LOAD ZONE*
- *HUB NODE*
